name: Four Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half the butter in a pan until melted.
2. Add the flour and stir until it forms a smooth paste, about 30 seconds.
3. Gradually add the milk while continuously stirring to prevent lumps.
4. Cook over low heat for about 5 minutes or until the sauce begins to thicken.
5. Mix well and let simmer for another few minutes on low heat.
6. Chop all the cheese into small pieces.
7. Add the cheese gradually, mixing constantly until melted and smooth.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Serve over hot, cooked pasta of your choice and top with grated cheese.
